scope: Current SCRES-IA Papers 2 and 3 exhaustive-search task only
precedence_rule: For current-task Paper-3 authorization, this artifact and its content-addressed current-task inputs supersede any historical claim-registry label. The bounded historical measurement remains historical evidence but is not an authorization token.

historical_claim.historical_status: Supported at small effect size, both observation arms
historical_claim.bounded_interpretation: An earlier Track-B probe reported a small retained-minus-reset effect over eight within-checkpoint online-adaptation cycles. The measurement is not retracted by this artifact.

later_same_contract_correction.finding: The Track-B learned policy underlying the historical probe lost to the calibration-only optimized full-contract constant policy on the untouched same-contract test: PPO-minus-static was -0.000018049 with CI95 [-0.000028615,-0.000008087].
later_same_contract_correction.consequence: The historical C12 result cannot establish current-task H_learned because its prerequisite learned adaptive advantage does not survive the strongest same-contract comparator.

required_before_paper3: Paper 2 establishes H_obs above the frozen practical gate under equal resources and all guardrails
a learned policy establishes H_learned above the strongest full-contract open-loop and classical comparator
the Paper-2 learned advantage survives virgin tapes and the state-feedback trajectory certificate
a Paper-3 campaign protocol is then frozen before any Paper-3 development or virgin campaign sequence is opened
unmet_requirements: No current candidate has passed the v2 pre-learner gate; all visible-v1 results are metric-development only
No current Paper-2 learned adaptive advantage exists
No current Paper-2 virgin confirmation exists
No current Paper-3 campaign preregistration or authorized virgin block exists

effective_current_disposition.reopening_rule: Recompute authorization prospectively only after a content-addressed current-task Paper-2 verdict confirms H_learned against the strongest same-contract comparator on virgin tapes. Historical C12 alone can never reopen the gate.
